name: glassypic
description: AI-powered image optimization — compress, resize, upscale, and generate SEO tags. One tool, all formats.
long_description: GlassyPic optimizes images using AI-powered compression (typically 60-80% size reduction), with optional resize, upscale, format conversion, and SEO metadata generation. Supports JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC, GIF, AVIF, TIFF, and BMP. Free to use with 20 credits/day as a guest — no signup required.

tools.name: optimize_image
tools.description: Compress, resize, upscale, convert format, and generate SEO tags for an image. Accepts local file paths or URLs.

tools.name: login
tools.description: Log in to your GlassyPic account via browser to unlock more credits.

tools.name: logout
tools.description: Log out of your GlassyPic account.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check account status: tier, credits remaining, and reset time.

tools.name: upgrade
tools.description: Open the GlassyPic pricing page to upgrade your plan.
